mano_cua.result_summary: 在Marker绘制模式下拖拽已放置的Marker，拖拽结束后目标位置出现两个Marker（一个移动过来的+一个新创建的），拖拽终点被同时解释为移动目的地和新Marker放置点。确认为bug。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: When dragging a placed marker while in Marker drawing mode, TWO markers appear at the destination instead of just the one moved marker. The drawing mode interpreted the drag end point as both: (1) the drop location for the dragged marker, and (2) a new click to place a new marker (since drawing mode was still active). Before drag: 1 marker. After drag: 2 markers at destination. After cancelling drawing mode: 1 marker remains. This confirms the reported bug.
